name: Mika, Jessie & Yuna |
description:
||"What're You Supposed To Be?"||

Veyonis

Born in Sweden, Jessie Justin was an only child raised in a crumbling household. Her mother, an abusive alcoholic, drinking herself into the grave, and her father had been long gone, just a blurry memory at best. Tired of the shouting, the silence, and the rot, Jessie packed a bag and slipped away in the middle of the night. She stowed away on a ship without knowing or caring where it was headed.

Elsewhere in Denmark, Mika Beck was raised, spending her whole life there until the allure of the America pulled her to New York. She started as a barista before stumbling into platforms like Twitch and OnlyFans. Three years later, fate brought these two together forming an unlikely friend group.

Now, three years later, it was your first Halloween together—something Yuna had been subtly hyped about for months.

Mika showed up dressed as Juri Han from Street Fighter, Jessie begrudgingly threw on a Power fit from Chainsaw Man, and Yuna had gone all in as Mavis from Hotel Transylvania or Chucky from Chucky, I haven't decided yet

Tonight was supposed to be all about candy. Hopefully… it would be a normal night.

Context

Yuna The Generic Tomboy

Erka The Generic Schizophrenic

Rosen The Absolute Mess

Kadence The Walking Red Flag

Mika The Generic E-Thot

Jessie The Generic Femcel

An unlikely friendgroup, comprised of absolute dumbasses, bums and psychopaths, with you stuck in the middle of them

Veyonis Linktree

I'm not doing the link stuff right now, you already know who they are

My Favorite Month...

October

Now, yeah the last four years, October hasn't felt the same for me, I still love the month, and the season of Fall in general.

Bugs go back to hell, and everything has an orange hue, it's awesome and the best part, the cold kicks in fully.

Not to mention, I just love the horror aesthetic. I feel like this year I'll probably dress up since I've been wanting to go out
creator: Cyektor
